title: 3D Character Art Lead
description:
About the Company
teamLFG (Sony Interactive Entertainment) is building an innovative new PlayStation IP with a passionate cross-discipline team focused on memorable characters and gameplay clarity.


About the Role
teamLFG is hiring a remote 3D Character Art Lead to guide character art from pre-production through production, mentor artists, and shape stylized characters that support fair, readable gameplay.


Responsibilities


  • Lead 3D character art and coordinate with narrative, design, and partner studios
  • Mentor artists through all production phases and foster strong creative feedback culture
  • Build scalable workflows, style guides, and quality standards for character assets
  • Partner with the art director on visual goals and character customization systems


Requirements


  • Deep understanding of character art for competitive action or fighting games
  • Early AAA game development leadership experience
  • Expert Maya/Blender/Max, Substance, and Unreal Engine skills
  • Stylized art expertise and experience scaling content with outsourcing partners


Compensation
$153,000 - $230,000 USD per year (varies by location; bonus and benefits eligible).


Location
Remote.

title: Digital Fashion Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Tailor Catalogue is a fashion-focused brand seeking creative talent for digital fashion illustration work.


About the Role
Tailor Catalogue is hiring a creative Digital Fashion Illustrator for a fully remote role creating fashion illustration work. Interested applicants should share a portfolio and brief introduction.


Responsibilities


  • Create digital fashion illustrations aligned with brand and campaign needs
  • Develop polished illustration assets for marketing and catalogue use
  • Collaborate remotely with the Tailor Catalogue team on creative direction
  • Deliver work on schedule with attention to detail and fashion aesthetics


Requirements


  • Strong portfolio demonstrating digital fashion illustration skills
  • Proficiency with digital illustration tools and workflows
  • Creative, detail-oriented approach and reliable remote communication
  • Ability to respond promptly to creative briefs and feedback


Compensation
â‚¦150,000 per month.


Location
Remote.

title: Freelance Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Holistic Ecosystem is a creative team building anime-style art for stream-related graphics and inspiring visual projects.


About the Role
Holistic Ecosystem is hiring a freelance, project-based Illustrator to create anime-style and chibi artwork for stream-related graphics and collaborative creative projects.


Responsibilities


  • Create anime-style and chibi illustrations for stream-related graphics
  • Deliver project-based illustration work from brief through final assets
  • Collaborate with the creative team on fun, inspiring visual projects
  • Meet project deadlines and incorporate feedback efficiently


Requirements


  • Strong portfolio in anime-style illustration (chibi, vtuber, or background design a plus)
  • Experience with sketching, coloring, and detailing workflows
  • Ability to dedicate 2-8 hours per day depending on project scope
  • Portfolio link required (Google Drive, Pixiv, Instagram, ArtStation, or similar)


Compensation
Project-based freelance compensation determined per project based on complexity.


Location
Remote.
skills: Anime illustration,Chibi art,Character design,Stream graphics,Digital illustration
